2005.issue: [E2005] No "common.news" in [io-package.json](https://github.com/moba15/ioBroker.hiob/blob/master/io-package.json) found for version 0.1.7 marked as "latest" at npm

3014.issue: [S3014] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3018.issue: [S3018] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is missing required permissions "contents: write" and "id-token: write" at job level. Trusted publishing will not work without them.

3019.issue: [W3019] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

3020.issue: [E3020] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 18 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "stream" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:stream" instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (scripts/toggle-identity.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/moba15/ioBroker.hiob/blob/master/io-package.json).

6007.issue: [E6007] Future year (5000) found in copyright at [README.md](https://github.com/moba15/ioBroker.hiob/blob/master/README.md). Please use "Copyright (c) 2023-2026 mor15Euro <moritz@bachmaiers.de>" at start of LICENSE section.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8916.issue: [W8916] Dependabot configuration "/.github/dependabot.yml" has no entry with "package-ecosystem: github-actions". Please add one.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

9006.issue: [S9006] .commitinfo file should be excluded by .gitignore, please add a line with text ".commitinfo" to .gitignore

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/moba15/ioBroker.hiob/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/moba15/ioBroker.hiob/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^22.19.17" at [package.json](https://github.com/moba15/ioBroker.hiob/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
